name: viewing-terrace
prompt: anime manga style, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high detail manga illustration, vibrant colors, studio quality anime key visual, wide establishing shot from slightly above eye level, semicircular golden stone viewing terrace jutting out over the cosmic void, carved ornate balustrade along the curved edge, the Ninth Terrace's tiered illuminated architecture rising behind in warm golden layers, a beautiful young woman with brunette waves leaning back against the balustrade facing inward with starfield behind her, a young man in dark mandarin collar suit standing a step away with arms at his sides looking out toward the void, their body language close but not touching with tension between them, golden luminara trees framing the scene on both sides, warm amber light from the avenue behind contrasting with cool starlight from the void, atmospheric perspective, Makoto Shinkai lighting with warm vs cool contrast

name: recall-orders
prompt: anime manga style, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high detail manga illustration, vibrant colors, studio quality anime key visual, medium shot from Idris's perspective looking at Sera, beautiful young woman with brunette waves leaning against a stone balustrade with starfield behind her, she is tilting her head to the right with an evaluating expression as if measuring how honest he will be, dark luminous eyes sharp and searching, one eyebrow slightly raised, mouth open speaking with quiet pointed authority, high cheekbones catching warm golden side-light from the avenue on her left while cool starlight touches her right side, elegant dark fitted dress with tech accents at collar and cuffs, her flowing hair catching both warm and cool light, the carved balustrade and stars serve as her backdrop, dramatic split warm/cool lighting on her face — two kinds of light, shallow depth of field

name: unopened
prompt: anime manga style, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high detail manga illustration, vibrant colors, studio quality anime key visual, close-up portrait from Sera's perspective, handsome young man with dark slightly unkempt hair, sharp angular features and strong jawline, dark watchful eyes with a stubbornly guarded expression as if refusing to engage with something he already understands, jaw set firmly, mouth barely open responding with deliberate calm, wearing dark mandarin collar suit creased from an earlier mission, warm golden rim light from the avenue behind him catching his hair and shoulder on the left, cool void-light on the right side of his face, the starfield and distant station-lights visible as bokeh behind him, his expression closed off but not hostile — the face of a man choosing not to look at something, cinematic portrait with dramatic warm/cool split lighting

name: neutrality
prompt: anime manga style, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high detail manga illustration, vibrant colors, studio quality anime key visual, medium shot from a slight low angle, handsome young man with dark unkempt hair turning partially toward the camera, his expression shifting from guarded to measured and political as he deflects to safer ground, one hand resting on the carved stone balustrade, dark watchful eyes looking slightly past the camera rather than directly at it, mouth open mid-sentence delivering a rehearsed argument, dark mandarin collar suit with clean mandarin collar catching warm golden light, the Ninth Terrace's tiered illuminated architecture visible behind him rising in golden layers, luminara trees and amber canopy framing the upper edge, warm amber tones throughout with golden light motes, shallow depth of field

dialogue.speaker: Idris
dialogue.text: The Terrace Council issued a neutrality reaffirmation. Neither Throne has authority here.

name: sera-dismisses
prompt: anime manga style, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high detail manga illustration, vibrant colors, studio quality anime key visual, medium close-up portrait of a beautiful young woman with rich brunette waves, her dark luminous eyes carrying a look of fond exasperation — she has heard this argument before and does not buy it, one eyebrow raised higher than the other, the corner of her mouth turned slightly as if suppressing either a smile or a sigh, mouth open speaking with quiet certainty, warm golden light from the left catching her cheekbone and hair while cool starlight from the void touches the right side of her face — the two kinds of light split across her features, a few golden light motes floating in the foreground slightly out of focus, shallow depth of field with warm golden bokeh, high detail on eyes and expression, the face of someone who loves you enough to not let you lie to yourself

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: That holds exactly as long as both Thrones decide to respect it.
